findings.finding: Task 3 verification doesn't assert P8 row position inside Post-Plan Checklist or after P7.
Task 4 ≥20-collected-items floor cannot discriminate filtered (36) from unfiltered-with-xfail (39).
try/finally revert handles Python exceptions but not SIGKILL/segfault/OOM/CI timeout.
findings.evidence_quote: reverts the mutation in a try/finally so the working tree is restored regardless of test outcome

findings.finding: Sentinel target plugins/cortex-interactive/skills/commit/SKILL.md is hardcoded; existence depends on commit remaining in justfile SKILLS array.
findings.evidence_quote: Pick a stable mirror like plugins/cortex-interactive/skills/commit/SKILL.md (existing, small) for the sentinel target
